name: humanizer
description: Humanizer hooks for OpenAI Codex CLI. Activate humanizer rules at session start and track mode changes across turns.
notes: These hook scripts are byte-identical to hooks/humanizer-*.js — copy them to ~/.codex/hooks/ before enabling.
Set HUMANIZER_DEFAULT_MODE in your environment to override the default mode (subtle, balanced, full, voice-match, anti-detector, off).
The flag file at ~/.codex/.humanizer-active is what the statusline reads; set CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR=~/.codex to keep everything under one dir.
